signatureMove.name: Head Butt
signatureMove.extraText: This attack deals {Null} damage against models which are further than 1" away.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy model 1" directly away from this model.

abilities.name: Felling Axe
abilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

abilities.name: Guerilla Tactician
abilities.description: Other friendly Fauns within 6" gain +1 Melee Stat and Swift: When making a Reaction Step while engaged by an enemy, this model may move 2" instead of the usual 1". Once per turn.

abilities.name: Furious Charge
abilities.description: Move this model 3" directly towards target enemy model. If this character's next action this turn is a Melee Attack against the same target then it deals +1 Dmg.

abilities.name: Hunting Horn
abilities.description: This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Move target other friendly Faun X+1".
The target is moved up to 3" by the resisting player.
